Champions: Deal 160/240/360 magic damage to the current target and Wound them for 5 seconds. If they are already Wounded, deal 30% bonus magic damage.Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

Deal 270/370/500 magic damage (+12% target's max Health) to the lowest Health enemy in range. If this kills them, devour them and permanently gain 35 maximum Health (doubled in Hyper Roll). (Current Bonus: scales with each enemy devoured)

Enter a defensive stance and gain 350/400/450 Shield that rapidly decays over 3 seconds. When it expires, deal 70/100/150 magic damage + 30% of the damage absorbed to enemies around and in front of Irelia.Ionia Bonus: +25 Armor and Magic Resist

In the actual game, Jhin's spell scales with Attack Damage (it deals 300% / 300% / 344% AD plus that flat 60 / 90 / 135 physical damage). If we only calculate the flat 60/90/135 damage from the sheet, his spell DPS will be mathematically incorrect and extremely low.

Passive: Gains new Passive effects as your Tactician levels up.Level 1: Attacks deal 30/45/70 bonus magic damage.Level 6: Every 3rd attack launches a wave that deals 30/45/70 magic damage and 20% Shreds enemies for 3 seconds.Level 9: Every attack launches a wave and they travel farther.Shred: Reduce Magic Resist
Open two portals near the current target. Destroy 50% of Shields and deal 220/330/500 magic damage to all enemies caught between the portals.
Grant the lowest Health ally 200/225/275 Shield for 4 seconds and empowers Orianna's next attack to deal 290/435/650 bonus magic damage.
Gain 250/325/400 Shield for 4 seconds. Deal 160/240/360 magic damage to the current target.
Deal 180/270/400 magic damage to adjacent enemies. Heal 220/270/320 for the first enemy hit and another 30 for each additional one.
Shoot at the current target and deal 190/190/200% Attack Damage to the first enemy hit. Reduce their Armor by 10/15/20 for the rest of combat.

Gain 1 Attack Speed for 4 seconds. For the duration, attacks explode on impact and deal 60% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex.4-Star Upgrade: Every 10th attack deals 120% Attack Damage bonus physical damage and ricochets to the largest clump of enemies, dealing 50% of that damage to enemies within 1 hex.
Deal 110/165/250 magic damage to the current target. For the rest of combat, Viego's attacks deal 20/30/45 bonus stacking magic damage.(Current Bonus: scales with stacks from prior attacks)
Fire 8 arrows in a cone, each dealing 10 (+160/165/175% Attack Damage) physical damage to the first enemy hit and Chilling them for 2 seconds.Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%
Reduce damage taken by 25/25/35% and heal for 300/350/400 over 2 seconds. After, deal 200/300/450 magic damage to adjacent enemies.
Fire 5 rockets at random enemies within 2 hexes of the current target. Each rocket deals 15/20/35 (+150/155/160% Attack Damage) physical damage.
Gain 250/300/400 Shield for 4 seconds. Deal 160/240/360 magic damage to enemies in a cone and Disarm them for 2/2/2 seconds.Disarm: Cannot move or attack, but CAN cast spells

Passive: Start combat with 30% Shield. When it expires, dismount and gain 65/70/75% stacking Attack Speed for the rest of combat.Active: Remount and gain 30% Shield.4-Star Upgrade: Execute enemies under 25% Health.

Grab an enemy from either side and slam them together, knocking them up. Deals 180/270/420 magic damage and Stuns them for 1/2/2 seconds. If only one enemy is grabbed, the damage and Stun duration are increased by 50%.Ionia Bonus: +180 max Health

Heal the lowest health ally for 140/160/180. If the ally is below 140/160/180% Health, heal them for an additional 140/160/180. Over the next 5 seconds, 5 stars hit the enemy closest to them. Each deals 120/180/280 magic damage.

Transform and gain 325/375/550 max Health. While transformed, deal 25/40/60 magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes every second.If already transformed, gain an additional 225/260/385 max Health and deal 100/160/300 magic damage to enemies within.

Hurl an explosive heat-seeking mushroom at the current target. When it detonates, enemies within 1 hex are Wounded and dealt 260/390/585 magic damage over 3 seconds.4-Star Upgrade: Increase the explosion radius by 1 hex.Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%

Passive: Whenever an enemy is knocked up or back by anything, throw a boulder towards them. It deals 120/180/270 magic damage to the first enemy hit.Active: Deal 220/330/495 magic damage to the current target and knock them up, Stunning them for 2 seconds.
Gain 350/400/450 Shield for 4 seconds. Deal 300% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex of the current target and 20% Sunder them for 4 seconds.Sunder: Reduce Armor
Passive: Attacks heal for 30/35/40.Active: Gain 100% Attack Speed for 2 seconds. Then, Stun adjacent enemies for 2 seconds.

Create a shadow at the furthest enemy within 2 hexes. Zed and his shadow slash adjacent enemies, dealing 25/40/50 (+140/140/150% Attack Damage) physical damage. Ionia Bonus: +15% Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage
Lock on to the farthest enemy and unleash a hail of 6 shots toward them. Each deals 20/35/60 (+125% Attack Damage) physical damage to the first enemy hit.
Deal 55/80/110 (+350% Attack Damage) physical damage to the current target. If they die, immediately cast this again with 90/95/100% damage.
Heal 0% of damage taken in the last 4 seconds and deal 255/380/570 magic damage to the current target.
Spin 3 times every second for the next 4 seconds. Each spin deals 80/82/85% Attack Damage physical damage to adjacent enemies.

Grant 30/40/50% Attack Speed to Jayce and 15% to the allies on his left and right for 3 seconds. Fire a blast at the current target that explodes on the first enemy hit. It deals 275/275/295% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies near the blast.
Passive: Attacks impale a spear in the target, which deals 18/27/45 true damage when removed. Kalista rips the spears out if it would kill the target.Active: Impale 6 spears in the current target.
Fire a burst of energy that explodes upon impact, dealing 200/300/470 magic damage to adjacent enemies. Every third cast launches 3 bursts.Ionia Bonus: +25 Ability Power

Throw three daggers that land next to enemies within 1 hexes. Then, teleport to each and deal 145/220/350 magic damage to adjacent enemies and Wound them for 6 seconds.Wound: Reduce healing received by 33%
Stun the current target for 2 seconds and deal 160/240/400 magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes of them. They take 10% more damage for the next 4 seconds.

Deal 250/250/255% Attack Damage physical damage to the current target and mark them. If they are below 66% max Health, deal true damage instead. If the target is marked, deal 240/240/250% Attack Damage bonus true damage.If this kills the target, rip through them 1 hex and heal for 10% Max Health.

Send a wave of sound at the largest clump of enemies and deal 170/255/420 magic damage to enemies hit; each hit reduces this damage by 33%. Allies hit by the wave gain 20/25/35% Attack Speed for the rest of combat.
Gain 500/580/680 Shield for 4 seconds. It redirects 50% of the damage received by adjacent allies.
Fire a plasma bolt towards the current target that deals 220/330/550 magic damage to the first enemy hit. It then splits in two, dealing 50% less damage whenever it passes through an enemy.

Fire a moon blast at the largest group of enemies that deals 240/240/750% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 2 hexes. For 7 seconds, equip 3 Chakram, plus 1 more for each enemy hit by the blast. Attacks deal 7/7/15% Attack Damage bonus physical damage for each Chakram equipped. Aphelios heals for 75% of damage dealt by Chakrams.

Passive: Every third attack, a Sand Soldier deals 110/160/500 magic damage to their target.Active: Summon a Sand Soldier to attack your target. If Azir already has 3 Soldiers, they all immediately deal 70% AP magic damage instead.
Dash around the current target and snip 3 times in a cone, each dealing 100/150/400 magic damage to enemies hit.Every 3 casts, gain 120/120/300 Armor and Magic Resist for 3/3/5 seconds.
Leap on a nearby enemy. Deal 140/210/800 magic damage to enemies within 2 hexes and Stun them for 2/2/8 seconds.
Dash away from all enemies, then fire 15/15/25 missiles split across the 4 nearest enemies. Each missile deals 80/120/240 magic damage.
Channel a barrage of light at the current target that deals 735/1100/2750 magic damage over 3 seconds, reducing their Magic Resist by 15/15/40 every second. If they die, shift to a new target.
Steal 4/4/15% maximum Health, 8% Attack Damage, 4/4/20 Armor, and 4/4/20 Magic Resist from the nearest 4/5/7 enemies for 8 seconds.While empowered, every third attack deals 4/4/7 physical damage.

Passive: Whenever an ally attacks a Chilled enemy, they deal 160/240/1200 bonus true damage.Active: Gain 600/700/2000 Shield for 4 seconds. Deal 160/240/1200 magic damage to nearby enemies and Chill them for 4 seconds.Chill: Reduce Attack Speed by 30%

Gain 350/450/2000 Shield and grant 225/275/1500 Shield to the 2 lowest-Health allies for 4 seconds. After shielding his allies, Shen's Shield refreshes with a burst, dealing 240/360/2500 magic damage to adjacent enemies.Ionia Bonus: +8% Damage Reduction

Passive: Whenever an enemy enters Attack Range, fire a blast from the leg facing that direction that deals 40/60/500 (+220% Attack Damage) physical damage. Each of Urgot's 6 legs has a 4/4/1 second cooldown.Active: Gain 350/450/1200 Shield for 5 seconds and dash behind the current target. Reset all leg cooldowns.

Send a whirlwind at the furthest enemy within 3 hexes, knocking up and Stunning all enemies hit. Dash to and slash the original target, dealing 55/85/300 (+500/500/1500% Attack Damage) physical damage to them. Slam them into the ground and deal 300/300/750% Attack Damage physical damage to enemies within 1 hex.Ionia Bonus: +15% OmnivampOmnivamp: Heal for percentage of damage dealt
Passive: Execute enemies below 8% max Health. Active: For the next 8/8/15 seconds, attacks chain lightning to 3/3/5 additional enemies, dealing 45/45/100% Attack Damage physical damage.

Steal essence from enemies around the current target, dealing 105/150/1000 magic damage and 20% Mana Reaving them. Every 2/2/0 casts, unleash a wave that deals 260/390/1999 magic damage to all enemies hit. This deals 33% more damage to enemies whose essence has been stolen.Ionia Bonus: +3 Mana per secondMana Reave: Increase max Mana until the next cast

Transform for 12/12/30 seconds, gaining 20% Omnivamp and converting 80% of bonus Attack Speed to Attack Damage. While transformed, attacks deal 275/275/2500% Attack Damage physical damage in an area.Omnivamp: Heal for percentage of damage dealt
Lash out at the lowest Health enemy in range 6/6/25 times. Each lash deals 18/30/100 (+85% Attack Damage) physical damage and 2% of the target's max Health as true damage.
Hurl a grenade towards the largest group of enemies, dealing 150/225/3141 magic damage to enemies in a large area and Stunning them for 2/2/15 seconds.

Heal for 10% Max Health, then knock up the current target before smashing them to the edge of the battlefield. Deal 250/400/1000 magic damage and Stun them for 2/2/10 seconds. Deal 250/400/1000 magic damage to enemies the target collides with and Stun them for 1/1/5 seconds.If the target can't be pushed back any further, knock them off the battlefield. Otherwise, chase after them.

Create 5/8/25 portals to Zaun, causing hired guns to fire at nearby enemies. Deals 125/230/2006 magic damage and Wounds, 30% Shreds, and 30% Sunders for 6 seconds. The more gold you have, the more powerful the portals become.25 Gold: +1 portal. Portals fire a rocket that deals 125/230/2006% damage in a one-hex radius.50 Gold: Double the portals. Summon 1 additional portals for every 20 Gold more.Wound: Reduce healing received by 50%Shred: Reduce Magic ResistSunder: Reduce Armor

Passive: Upon death, reanimate with 100% Health, decaying at 20/13/0% maximum Health per second. Sion can no longer use his Ability, but is immune to crowd control and gains 2/2/10 Attack Speed.Active: Charge towards the most enemies within 3 hexes. Deal 225/235/500% Attack Damage physical damage to any enemies along the way and knock them up, Stunning them for 1/2/15 seconds.
Fire a massive beam at the furthest enemy, dealing 235/250/2000% Attack Damage physical damage to all enemies hit. Any allies hit gain 200/275/4000 Shield for 4/4/15 seconds.

Featherstrike: Summon feathers that converge on the current target, dealing physical damage to it and less to adjacent enemies; each feather removes Armor from the first target hit until the end of combat.

Formless Blade: Attacks strike in a cone, hitting up to 2 additional enemies for physical damage; every 3rd attack strikes in a line and grants Attack Speed. Active grants a Shield and a dash to safety.
Blade Waltz: Dash through enemies dealing physical damage, prioritizing low-Health targets; becomes untargetable and heals for a portion of damage dealt during the dash.
Quinn and Valor attack together for bonus physical damage; periodically Valor marks the farthest enemy so Quinn's next attack on it deals bonus damage and blinds.
Shapesplitter: Neeko splits into clones that taunt nearby enemies before exploding for magic damage.
Royal Combo: Dash and deal physical damage, empowered by whichever elemental terrain is currently active.
Sap Magic: Passively gains Mana whenever an enemy casts an Ability; actively heals on his next attack.
Undercity Tactics: Throws a vial at the nearest surrounded enemy, covering nearby hexes in chemicals that damage enemies and heal allies over time.
X Marks the Spot: Calls down an X-shaped rain of bullets, destroying a portion of the target's Shields and dealing magic damage.
Origins: Conquer unique player boards to gain stacks (up to 5). Noxus units gain Health, AP, and AD.    • (3): 170 HP, 17 AP, 17% AD (+5% per stack)    • (6): 340 HP, 34 AP, 34% AD (+10% per stack)    • (9): 700 HP, 70 AP, 70% AD (+20% per stack)

During planning, your strongest Demacians become Elites and receive a random Radiant item. Elites grant adjacent allies Armor & MR (does not stack).    • (3): 1 Elite, +5 Armor/MR    • (5): 2 Elites, +30 Armor/MR    • (7): 3 Elites, +40 Armor/MR    • (9): 5 Elites, +100 Armor/MR

Every 4 seconds, strongest Ionians are enlightened to their spirit form, gaining 20 Mana. Each unit has a unique Ionian bonus that doubles in spirit form.    • (3): 100% Ionian bonus, 1 enlightened unit    • (6): 200% Ionian bonus, 2 enlightened units    • (9): 300% Ionian bonus, 3 enlightened units

Every 4 seconds, Shurimans heal 7% max HP. After 8 seconds, select Shurimans Ascend, gaining 20% max HP and 50% Attack Speed.    • (3): The strongest Shuriman ascends    • (5): All Shurimans ascend    • (7): All Shurimans ascend at the start of combat instead    • (9): +50% Ascension bonus effectiveness

Summon a placeable Void Egg that intercepts enemy positioning. It scales health and AP by 25% per total star level of your Void units.    • (3): Summon Void Remora    • (6): Summon Rift Herald    • (8): Summon Baron Nashor

Gain a placeable T-Hex. Losing player combat grants Charges. Winning converts Charges to permanent Power for the T-Hex. You can sell it to cash out.    • (3): Gain the T-Hex    • (6): Each loss counts as 2 losses; winning grants bonus round-by-round loot

Zaun units gain unique, attachable Chem-Mods (interactive cybernetic modifications) that modify their abilities.    • (2): Gain 1 random Chem-Mod    • (4): Gain 2 Chem-Mods    • (6): Gain 3 Chem-Mods and Overcharge them (unlocking secondary traits)

After 8 seconds of combat, an ice storm strikes the board. Enemies take a percentage of their max HP as true damage and are debuffed for 15 seconds.    • (2): 5% HP damage, enemies 40% Sundered (Armor) and Shredded (MR)    • (3): 12% HP damage, enemies also 50% Mana Reaved (max mana increased)    • (4): 20% HP damage, enemies also stunned for 1.5 seconds

After dealing or taking damage 12 times, Shadow Isles units gain a Shield for 15 seconds and generate Mana per second for the rest of combat.    • (2): 40% HP Shield, 10 Mana/sec    • (4): 70% HP Shield, 15 Mana/sec    • (6): 100% HP Shield, 20 Mana/sec

Direct multipliers to restorative logic. All healing and shielding on your team is amplified.    • (2): 18% increased healing and shielding    • (3): 25% increased healing and shielding    • (4): 34% increased healing and shielding

Ixtal units create shifting Elemental Hexes that empower units standing on them; the active element changes each game.    (2): 1 hex created    (3): 2 hexes created    (4): hexes gain a bonus effect based on the active element (e.g. Stone: CC immunity + damage reduction; Ice: protection below 30% HP). [Set 9.5 / Horizonbound addition]

Bilgewater Abilities and attacks mark enemies, storing a percentage of damage dealt; after 2 seconds a cannonball strikes the mark for the stored damage plus a flat bonus, scaling harder the more Bilgewater units are fielded.    Note: exact per-tier percentages not fully confirmed via public research as of this write (2026-07-07) — verify against in-game tooltip before using for balance math. [Set 9.5 / Horizonbound addition]
Classes: Bastion units gain Armor and MR. This bonus is doubled for the first 10 seconds of combat.    • (2): +20 Defenses    • (4): +45 Defenses    • (6): +90 Defenses    • (8): +180 Defenses

Challengers gain bonus Attack Speed. Upon their target's death, they dash to a new target and double this bonus for 2.5 seconds.    • (2): 30% Attack Speed    • (4): 60% Attack Speed    • (6): 95% Attack Speed    • (8): 140% Attack Speed

Sorcerers gain flat AP. When an enemy dies after being damaged by a Sorcerer, they trigger a shockwave dealing a % of that enemy's max HP to adjacent targets.    • (2): +25 AP, 5% max HP explosion    • (4): +50 AP, 10% max HP explosion    • (6): +85 AP, 11% max HP explosion to 2 enemies    • (8): +125 AP, 15% max HP explosion to 2 enemies

Every 3 seconds, your units generate Mana.    • (2): +5 Mana for Invokers    • (4): +15 Mana for Invokers, +5 Mana for the rest of the team    • (6): +20 Mana for Invokers, +15 Mana for the rest of the team
Your team gains 100 flat HP. Bruisers gain bonus scaling maximum Health.    • (2): +10% Maximum HP    • (4): +40% Maximum HP    • (6): +70% Maximum HP

Innate: Gain 1 Hex range. Every 3 seconds, Deadeyes attack the enemy with the highest health percentage, dealing bonus physical damage scaling with AD.    • (2): +20% AD Bonus Damage    • (4): +65% AD Bonus Damage    • (6): +150% AD Bonus Damage
Juggernaut units take reduced damage as their current health drops.    • (2): 15% to 25% Damage Reduction    • (4): 25% to 40% Damage Reduction    • (6): 35% to 50% Damage Reduction

Multicasters cast their combat spell multiple times. Subsequent casts have reduced effectiveness.    • (2): 1 extra cast at 50% reduced effectiveness    • (4): 2 extra casts at 60% reduced effectiveness

Innate: Rogue units jump to the enemy backline when dropping below 50% Health.    • (2): Attacks bleed the target for 15% of their max HP as magic damage over 2.5 seconds    • (4): Bleed damage is increased to 30% max HP
Slayers gain 12% Omnivamp and deal bonus damage that doubles against targets below 60% Health.    • (2): +5% Damage Amp    • (4): +30% Damage Amp    • (6): +60% Damage Amp

Combat Start: Allies in the front 2 rows gain a Shield for 15 seconds. Allies in the back 2 rows gain flat Ability Power.    • (2): 200 Shield / 20 AP    • (3): 350 Shield / 30 AP    • (4): 500 Shield / 45 AP    • (5): 700 Shield / 60 AP
When Gunner champions attack, they gain bonus Attack Damage, up to 8 stacks.    ◼ (2): 7% AD per stack    ◼ (4): 13% AD per stack    ◼ (6): 25% AD per stack

Vanquishers gain bonus Critical Strike Chance and Critical Strike Damage; damage from Vanquisher Abilities can also critically strike.    (2): +15% Crit Chance, +10% Crit Damage    (4): +35% Crit Chance, +25% Crit Damage    (6): +55% Crit Chance, +40% Crit Damage. [Set 9.5 / Horizonbound addition, replaces Deadeye]

TFT Balancing Rules: TFT Set 9 Balancing Rules & Reference Guidelines
Tanks consistently possess 50% to 65% more base EHP than carries.
Taric gains shields, Karma AP carry scales
Ahri carry gains 25% EHP; tanks gain revives/knock-aways
AD is kept flat between 40 and 80 across all tiers (1-star). Carries scale via speed/spells.
Slow attacks, slower base mana generation
Prevents instant cast resets from single large hits
Casts once early, difficult to cycle a second time.
Does NOT scale with star level
Does NOT scale with star level
Does NOT scale with star level
